commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Song of Songs 3:2 I will rise now, and go about the city in the streets, and in the squares I will seek him whom my soul loves: I sought him, but I found him not. Oftentimes God, exercising the souls of the righteous, allows them to fall into divers temptations; and at one time grants their request deliverance, and at another delays the gift, contriving in all ways the profit of those who delight in Him. (Theodoret of Cyrus).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
